title: phaius tankervilleae var. tankervilleae
intro: Phaius tankervilleae var. tankervilleae, also known as the Tankerville's orchid, is a terrestrial orchid plant species native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phaius tankervilleae var. tankervilleae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make teas or infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
